title: Maintain instruments and equipment
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Maintain instruments and equipment demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria.

elements.title: Perform serviceability checks

pcs.text: Perform pre-use and after-use checks in accordance with appropriate workplace and manufacturer procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Perform pre-use and after-use checks in accordance with appropriate workplace and manufacturer procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform pre-use and after-use checks in accordance with appropriate workplace and manufacturer procedures.

pcs.text: Identify faulty or unsafe components and equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify faulty or unsafe components and equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify faulty or unsafe components and equipment.

pcs.text: Perform basic troubleshooting and repairs and report major service faults for repair in accordance with appropriate workplace and manufacturer procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Perform basic troubleshooting and repairs and report major service faults for repair in accordance with appropriate workplace and manufacturer procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform basic troubleshooting and repairs and report major service faults for repair in accordance with appropriate workplace and manufacturer procedures.

pcs.text: Complete instrument and equipment logbooks to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete instrument and equipment logbooks to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete instrument and equipment logbooks to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Perform serviceability checks

elements.title: Conduct routine maintenance safely

pcs.text: Identify maintenance procedures, schedules, records and safety requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify maintenance procedures, schedules, records and safety requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify maintenance procedures, schedules, records and safety requirements.

pcs.text: Identify and replace or repair damaged, worn and/or spent components or items in accordance with appropriate workplace and manufacturer procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and replace or repair damaged, worn and/or spent components or items in accordance with appropriate workplace and manufacturer procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and replace or repair damaged, worn and/or spent components or items in accordance with appropriate workplace and manufacturer procedures.

pcs.text: Clean instruments and equipment using recommended cleaning agents and techniques in accordance with appropriate workplace and manufacturer procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean instruments and equipment using recommended cleaning agents and techniques in accordance with appropriate workplace and manufacturer procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean instruments and equipment using recommended cleaning agents and techniques in accordance with appropriate workplace and manufacturer procedures.

pcs.text: Store instruments and equipment in accordance with appropriate workplace and manufacturer procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Store instruments and equipment in accordance with appropriate workplace and manufacturer procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Store instruments and equipment in accordance with appropriate workplace and manufacturer procedures.

pcs.text: Record maintenance performed and any issues identified in accordance with appropriate workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record maintenance performed and any issues identified in accordance with appropriate workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record maintenance performed and any issues identified in accordance with appropriate workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Arrange any reordering of consumable stocks and equipment components
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Arrange any reordering of consumable stocks and equipment components?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Arrange any reordering of consumable stocks and equipment components.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Conduct routine maintenance safely

elements.title: Perform calibration checks

pcs.text: Operate instruments and equipment in accordance with appropriate workplace and manufacturer procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Operate instruments and equipment in accordance with appropriate workplace and manufacturer procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Operate instruments and equipment in accordance with appropriate workplace and manufacturer procedures.

pcs.text: Check calibration using specified standards and/or procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check calibration using specified standards and/or procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check calibration using specified standards and/or procedures.

pcs.text: Record all calibration data accurately and legibly
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record all calibration data accurately and legibly?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record all calibration data accurately and legibly.

pcs.text: Record calibration status and identify out-of-calibration equipment/instruments
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record calibration status and identify out-of-calibration equipment/instruments?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record calibration status and identify out-of-calibration equipment/instruments.

pcs.text: Quarantine out-of-calibration items in accordance with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Quarantine out-of-calibration items in accordance with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Quarantine out-of-calibration items in accordance with workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Report items unable to be calibrated in accordance with appropriate workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report items unable to be calibrated in accordance with appropriate workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report items unable to be calibrated in accordance with appropriate workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Perform calibration checks
